plugins.name: oh-my-codebuddy
plugins.description: Complete OMC (Oh My CodeBuddy) plugin with agents, commands, skills, hooks, tools, and MCP servers. Extracted from codebuddy-marketplace for CodeBuddy plugin system.

agents.name: librarian
agents.description: Docs lookup, GitHub research, implementation examples

agents.name: gh-repo-research
agents.description: Clone GitHub repository, analyze codebase, and generate comprehensive technical documentation

commands.name: ralph-loop
commands.description: Start self-referential dev loop until completion

commands.name: init-research
commands.description: Initialize research documentation with TODO markers for external research needs

commands.name: ralph-loop-research
commands.description: Deep research loop that processes all TODO: RESEARCH HERE markers, performs external research, and generates professional wiki-format content

commands.name: ralph-loop-wiki
commands.description: Generate comprehensive technical wiki from PRD, research findings, and codebase analysis following wiki_template.md format

skills.name: browser
skills.description: Browser automation tasks using Chrome DevTools Protocol (CDP)

skills.name: codex
skills.description: Execute Codex CLI for code analysis, refactoring, and automated code changes

skills.name: deep-research
skills.description: Complete research workflow system for codebase analysis, deep external research, and comprehensive technical wiki generation

skills.name: gemini
skills.description: Execute Gemini CLI for AI-powered code analysis and generation

skills.name: omc
skills.description: Multi-agent orchestration for code analysis, bug investigation, fix planning, and implementation

skills.name: product-requirements
skills.description: Interactive Product Owner skill for requirements gathering, analysis, and PRD generation

skills.name: prototype-prompt-generator
skills.description: Generate detailed, structured prompts for creating UI/UX prototypes

skills.name: skill-install
skills.description: Install CodeBuddy skills from GitHub repositories with automated security scanning

skills.name: test-cases
skills.description: Generate comprehensive test cases from PRD documents or user requirements
